Balboa Boutiques Plaza & Land

📍 Marbella, Bella Vista · Avenida Balboa, Panama City

The Opportunity

The last remaining first-line lots on Avenida Balboa in Marbella — one of Panama City's most prestigious addresses. Two first-line waterfront parcels plus a second-line parcel, together with the operating Balboa Boutiques commercial plaza.

Balboa Boutiques Plaza has operated since 2016 with anchor tenants including Coffee Bean, La Hacienda Real, BBQ & Steak House across 57 units and 123 parking spaces.

Land Parcels

  • Finca 47960 (1st Line): 2,800.94 m²
  • Finca 47980 (1st Line): 2,805.54 m²
  • Finca 47990 (2nd Line): 2,804.00 m²
  • All zoned 1ZM9 — up to 80 floors, mixed use

  • 10% deposit on signing

  • Share-sale structure — tax loss benefit available

Isla Restingue (Tintorera)

📍 Pacific Ocean, Panama · Private Island

10 haTitled Land Area
$7,000,000Asking Price (Neg.)
FreshwaterNatural Spring On-Island
PacificPristine Ocean Location

An Untouched Paradise

A fully titled 10-hectare private island in Panama's Pacific — one of the rarest real estate opportunities in Central America. Known as Isla Tintorera, it features pristine white sand beaches and crystal-clear waters rivalling the finest Caribbean destinations.

  • 10 hectares — fully titled, legally clean
  • Rare natural freshwater spring on-island
  • Pristine white sand beaches, turquoise waters
  • Completely uninhabited — pure development potential
  • Ideal for eco-resort, boutique hotel, or private estate

Investment Potential

Private island ownership in Panama is extraordinarily rare. With Panama's growing eco-tourism reputation this represents a generational asset. The freshwater spring makes self-sufficient luxury development viable.

  • Strong Panamanian legal title protections
  • Growing global demand for private island resorts
  • Rich marine biodiversity — world-class diving & fishing
  • Accessible by private boat from the Pacific coast

Asking price: $7,000,000 (negotiable). Private boat viewing arranged on request.

3 Bed / 2 BathMain House

Property Overview

A move-in ready home in Lluvia de Oro III, Arraijan — priced below its $97,344 market value. Near-24-hour public transport, Metro station just 7–10 min by car.

  • 3 bedrooms with built-in hardwood wardrobes
  • 2 bathrooms — one en-suite
  • Open living-dining area, full kitchen with granite counter
  • 2 covered parking + 2 sidewalk spaces
  • Covered exterior corridor & laundry area

Bonus Independent Spaces

  • Front Office Suite: Independent entrance, own bathroom, A/C, laminate floor, private patio — ideal for home business or rental income
  • Rear Storage/Suite: Large room with independent exterior entry — storage, service quarters, or separate rental unit

Pricing

  • Listed at $91,500 — negotiable
  • Open to offers from $90,000
  • Market value: $97,344

WaterfrontDirect Av. Balboa Frontage

MarbellaPanama City's Premier District

The Last First-Line Lots on Av. Balboa

Two contiguous parcels with direct Avenida Balboa frontage in Marbella — the last remaining buildable first-line plots on the Cinta Costera waterfront promenade in Panama City.

  • Finca 47960 — 2,800.94 m²
  • Finca 47980 — 2,805.54 m² (contiguous)
  • South: Avenida Balboa (direct frontage)
  • East: Calle Anastasio Ruiz Noriega
  • North: Calle Juan de la Guardia
  • West: PH Balboa Plaza
  • Coordinates: 8.97569, -79.52069

Zoning 1ZM9 — Full Potential

1ZM9 is Panama's highest density zoning, permitting the broadest possible mix of uses:

  • Residential towers up to 80 floors
  • Commercial: retail, supermarkets, shopping centres
  • Hotels, restaurants, entertainment, convention centres
  • Offices, banks, professional services
  • Educational & healthcare facilities
  • Max density: 2,000 persons/hectare
  • Min lot: 800 m² — each parcel exceeds this individually

MarbellaPanama City's Premier District

Ready-to-Build Marbella Plot

Finca 47990 is a 2,804 m² second-line parcel in Marbella, Bella Vista — one block behind Avenida Balboa. Surrounded by luxury residential towers, with an approved project and paid grading permit, allowing a buyer to break ground immediately.

  • Finca 47990 — 2,804.00 m²
  • South: Calle Juan de la Guardia
  • East: Calle Anastasio Ruiz Noriega
  • North: PH Parque de Marbella
  • West: PH Mar Abierto
  • Approved architectural project included
  • Grading/earthmoving permit already paid

Zoning 1ZM9 — What You Can Build

  • Residential towers up to 80 floors
  • Mixed-use podium: retail base + residential/hotel above
  • Commercial, offices, banks, services
  • Hotels, boutique lodging, entertainment
  • 3.5× the minimum lot size required

The seller's original plan was a major tower complex here. Full concept at thepanarama.com

The Panama Advantage

Why Invest in Panama

A rare convergence of stability, growth, and opportunity in the Americas.

"Panama's real estate market offers dollarized transactions, attractive tax incentives, and a growing international community — making it the region's premier investment destination."

💵

USD Economy

Panama uses the US dollar, eliminating currency exchange risk.

🏛️

Tax Benefits

Pensionado visa and attractive incentives for foreign property owners.

📈

Market Growth

Consistent appreciation in prime corridors.

🌎

Strategic Location

The crossroads of the Americas — connecting all directions.

What We Offer

Full-Spectrum Services

01

Residential Sales

Expert guidance through every step of residential property transactions in Panama's finest neighbourhoods.

02

Commercial Real Estate

Office spaces, retail, hospitality assets and industrial facilities — connecting businesses with ideal spaces.

03

Land & Development

Access to premium development land including first-line Avenida Balboa lots and private island parcels.

04

Investment Advisory

Data-driven market analysis and personalised investment strategies for Panama's best opportunities.

05

Legal & Relocation

Navigating Panama's legal framework with trusted partners, plus white-glove relocation services.

06

Property Management

Comprehensive management ensuring your investment performs optimally — tenant relations and reporting.
